configImprovements.title: Increase interval for self-optimization
configImprovements.rationale: Running self-optimization every 10 minutes generates too much noise without sufficient new metrics data.
configImprovements.expectedImpact: Reduces system overhead and prevents log flooding in the data directory.

configImprovements.title: Enable deep parallel execution
configImprovements.rationale: High success rates on current batch sizes indicate we can safely scale parallel processing.
configImprovements.expectedImpact: Improves overall throughput for bulk code processing tasks.

policyChanges.title: Strict retention on optimization logs
policyChanges.change: Auto-delete self-optimization JSON logs older than 7 days
policyChanges.rationale: Frequent polling generates hundreds of JSON files per day, taking up unnecessary disk space.

routingChanges.rationale: Consistently provides superior context awareness in complex multi-file scenarios.
Higher reliability in detecting sophisticated exploit chains and vulnerabilities.

suggestions.title: Increase interval for self-optimization
suggestions.summary: selfOptimization.intervalMs -> 3600000. Reduces system overhead and prevents log flooding in the data directory.

suggestions.title: Enable deep parallel execution
suggestions.summary: orchestrator.maxConcurrency -> 8. Improves overall throughput for bulk code processing tasks.

suggestions.title: Strict retention on optimization logs
suggestions.summary: Auto-delete self-optimization JSON logs older than 7 days (low). Frequent polling generates hundreds of JSON files per day, taking up unnecessary disk space.

suggestions.title: Routing for code-generation
suggestions.summary: Prefer gemini (confidence 92%). Consistently provides superior context awareness in complex multi-file scenarios.

suggestions.title: Routing for security-audit
suggestions.summary: Prefer kairos (confidence 88%). Higher reliability in detecting sophisticated exploit chains and vulnerabilities.
